name: Let's Game It Out
oneLine: American YouTuber who breaks simulation and tycoon games in absurd ways to find their hidden limits.
bio: Josh Knoles, born 1983, hosts Let's Game It Out, a channel devoted to pushing simulator, tycoon and sandbox games well past their intended use to expose bugs, loopholes and emergent chaos. The channel started as a duo with co-host Anthony before becoming solo in late 2018. Indie developers now routinely send him early-access keys as a kind of stress test, and the format has made breaking your game on his channel a badge of honour for emerging studios.
